core_concept: 一個被詛咒的 Nintendo 64 主機與其周圍的詭異氛圍
composition_hint: 將 Nintendo 64 主機置於畫面中央，用陰影和光線強調神秘氛圍
potential_subjects: A haunted Nintendo 64 console with glowing cartridge
The ghostly figure in the shadow of the game console
A creepy game cartridge with eerie light
original_excerpt:
BEN Drowned
or
Haunted Majora's Mask
is a well-known creepypasta (and later, an alternate reality game) created by Alex Hall, also known as "Jadusable". The story revolves around a Majora's Mask cartridge that is haunted by the ghost (if it is a ghost) of a boy named Ben. Analysis and updates on a possible addition to the story from the original author can be found on the
Jadusable Wiki
.

NOT
post Cleverbot conversations in the discussion area or anywhere else on the wiki. Doing so will
